name: Dashboard companion router renders context-aware CTA and navigates on click
description: After login, the dashboard shows a companion-voiced CTA panel with a study action label, a reason subtitle, and a pixel-art icon. Clicking the CTA navigates to a valid study page (e.g. /app/review or /app/feynman) without error.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the app login page and log in with the test credentials
Wait for the dashboard page to load after login (the page that shows 'Welcome home')

Verify the dashboard contains a prominent CTA panel (marked with data-tour='dashboard-cta') that displays a pixel-art icon, a text label in the accent color, and a smaller reason/subtitle text below it
Click the companion router CTA panel (the large clickable panel with the arrow)
Verify navigation succeeded: the browser is now on a study page (URL contains /app/review, /app/feynman, or /app/research) and the page renders content without a 404 or blank screen
